turns.user_message: I saw a beautiful sunset yesterday and it just looked flat to me. I know I should have felt something, but I didn't.
That sunset moment keeps coming back to me, and I realize nothing has sparked joy since. I feel like a blank page that nothing can write on.
I think my memory of that sunset is the last time I even expected to feel something. Now the whole world feels like it's behind a thick, soundproof glass.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by referencing a specific recent moment.
